---
title: "Split a Folder into Five Parts"
subtitle: "An R-driven workflow"
author: "Jacqueline Wu"
date: "2025-08-05"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
```

#### 1. Read arguments or hard-code paths
```{r}
args <- commandArgs(trailingOnly = TRUE)
if (length(args) >= 2) {
  input_dir  <- args[1]  # replace if hard-coding: your source folder
  output_dir <- args[2]  # replace if hard-coding: your destination parent folder
} else {
  # Change these two lines:
  input_dir  <- "C:/Users/jacqu/Box/Biodiversity Credits Project/ARU Data download/Ellsworth/Plot09_608/Data"  # YOUR input folder[Need to be changed based on your device]
  output_dir <- "C:/Users/jacqu/Box/Biodiversity Credits Project/ARU Data download/Ellsworth/Plot09_608/SplitData"  # YOUR output parent folder[Need to be changed based on your device]
}

```
#### 2. Configuration
```{r}
n_group   <- 5 # number of sub-folders
```
#### 3. Main process
```{r}
# List all files (non-recursive)
files   <- list.files(input_dir, full.names = TRUE)
n_files <- length(files)
if (n_files == 0) stop("No files found in input_dir")
# Sort files by name (so that ordering matches your explorer)
files <- sort(files)
# Compute how many files per group (sequential)
chunk_size <- ceiling(n_files / n_group)
# Assign group index based on position
grp_indices <- ((seq_len(n_files) - 1) %/% chunk_size) + 1
# Cap to n_group in case of rounding up
grp_indices[grp_indices > n_group] <- n_group

# Copy files into sub-folders named part_1 ... part_5
for (i in seq_along(files)) {
  grp    <- grp_indices[i]
  subdir <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("part_", grp))
  if (!dir.exists(subdir)) {
    dir.create(subdir, recursive = TRUE)
  }
  file.copy(from = files[i],
            to   = file.path(subdir, basename(files[i])))
}

message(sprintf("Done: %d files split into %d folders under '%s'.",
                n_files, n_group, output_dir))
```
